hierarchy.h1: text-5xl lg:text-6xl tracking-tighter leading-none font-medium font-['Fraunces'] text-ink
hierarchy.h2: text-2xl lg:text-3xl tracking-tight font-medium font-['Fraunces'] text-ink
hierarchy.hero_number: text-6xl lg:text-7xl tracking-tighter font-medium font-['Fraunces'] text-forest
hierarchy.data_small: text-sm font-medium font-['IBM_Plex_Mono'] text-ink/70 uppercase tracking-[0.05em]

typography.instructions: Use Fraunces exclusively for main headings and the large 'Recovered this week' counter. Use IBM Plex Mono for all financial amounts (₹), dates, Udyam badges, and Section 43B(h) citations to give a 'tax code / ledger' authoritative aesthetic. Cabinet Grotesk serves as the workhorse for general UI text.

colors.instructions: Avoid all generic SaaS blues and 'AI' purples. The app should feel like a modern, digital ledger on high-quality parchment. Primary background is a warm cream (#F9F6F0). Surfaces are white with a 1px solid border (#EBE7DD). Accents are earthy and authoritative: Terracotta for escalations, Forest Green for recoveries. Text must be Deep Ink, never pure black or muddy gray.

visual_enhancers.borders: 1px solid border-ink/10. Use 'Grid Borders' pattern for tables and data-heavy sections (border-collapse, borders on right/bottom only).
visual_enhancers.shadows: Minimal. Rely on 1px borders for structure. For floating elements (drawers/modals), use a sharp drop shadow: shadow-[4px_4px_0px_rgba(10,17,40,0.1)].
visual_enhancers.surfaces: Flat solid surfaces only. No glassmorphism. This is a B2B finance and legal tool—transparency and blur reduce legibility and seriousness.
visual_enhancers.textures: Optional: very subtle SVG noise overlay on the primary background to simulate paper/ledger feel (opacity 2%).

layout_and_spacing.general: High Density Grid for the dashboard. Generous spacing (p-8 to p-12) for outer wrappers, tight spacing (p-4 to p-6) within cards.

widget_spans.recovered_hero: col-span-1 lg:col-span-1 row-span-1 (Tall or wide depending on layout)

layout_and_spacing.alignment: Optical alignment over geometrical. Left-align data tables, forms, and paragraphs. Only center empty states.

buttons.primary: bg-ink text-primary hover:bg-ink/90 font-['Cabinet_Grotesk'] rounded-none border border-ink px-6 py-2 transition-colors
buttons.secondary: bg-primary text-ink hover:bg-tertiary font-['Cabinet_Grotesk'] rounded-none border border-ink/20 px-6 py-2 transition-colors
buttons.accent: bg-terracotta text-white hover:bg-terracotta/90 rounded-none border border-terracotta px-6 py-2 transition-colors

badges.rung_1: bg-blue-50 text-blue-700 border border-blue-200 px-2 py-1
badges.rung_2: bg-marigold/10 text-marigold border border-marigold/20 px-2 py-1
badges.rung_3: bg-terracotta/10 text-terracotta border border-terracotta/20 px-2 py-1
badges.udyam: bg-ink/5 text-ink border border-ink/10 px-2 py-1 font-['IBM_Plex_Mono'] uppercase

components.cards: bg-white border border-ink/10 rounded-none p-6. Never use default Shadcn rounded borders. Make them sharp and rectangular.
components.tables: Dense. Header text uses IBM Plex Mono uppercase text-xs. Cells have border-b border-ink/10. Zebra striping with bg-primary/30 for alternate rows.
components.drawer_modal: bg-white border-l border-ink/10 shadow-2xl. Backdrop must be bg-ink/60 (solid tinted gray, no full transparency).

icons_and_media.style: Duotone or Regular weight. Sharp, professional.
icons_and_media.instructions: Use Phosphor icons. Install via `yarn add @phosphor-icons/react`. Do not use emojis.

motion.transitions: Fast and crisp. duration-150 ease-out. No bouncy animations.
motion.interactions: Hover states on all rows and buttons. Subtle background color shift (bg-primary to bg-tertiary).
motion.feed: New items in the activity feed should slide down and fade in (framer-motion y: -10, opacity: 0 -> y: 0, opacity: 1).

accessibility.contrast: Strict APCA/WCAG AA compliance. Dark Ink against Cream/White has high contrast.
accessibility.data_testid: MANDATORY. Add `data-testid` to all interactive elements (buttons, inputs, table rows, tabs, preview toggles).

specific_features.invoice_ledger: Must display ₹ amounts formatted in Indian Number System (e.g., ₹1,50,000). Highlight overdue days in Terracotta if >45 days, Marigold if 16-45, Ink if <=15.
specific_features.control_strip: Sticky bar at the top or bottom for demo controls ('Run agent tick', 'Simulate reply', 'Mark paid'). Use a distinct background (e.g., bg-ink text-white) to separate it from the real UI.
specific_features.message_preview: Use a monospace font block for the statutory message (Rung 3) to emphasize the 'legal/tax code' nature. Include Section 43B(h) and MSMED Act citations prominently.
specific_features.charts: Use Shadcn charts (Recharts) for the Aging Buckets. Colors: Current (Ink/20), 1-15 (Ink/40), 16-45 (Marigold), 46-90 (Terracotta), 90+ (Red).

universal_guidelines: You tend to converge toward generic, 'on distribution' outputs. Avoid this: make creative, distinctive frontends that surprise and delight.
DO NOT use generic centered layouts. Left-align for reading flow.
Create depth through 1px sharp borders and typography contrast, NOT generic drop shadows.
NEVER use AI assistant Emoji characters.
All interactive and key informational elements MUST include a `data-testid` attribute (e.g., `data-testid='invoice-row-123'`).
Use standard Indian numerical format (lakhs/crores) for all ₹ values.
Do NOT use complete transparent background in header, overlays, or dropdowns. Ensure solid backgrounds for readability.
instructions_to_main_agent: Initialize standard Shadcn components but override their radii to `rounded-none` and customize colors to match the Parchment/Ink palette.

Install required fonts from Google Fonts: Fraunces, Cabinet Grotesk (or similar geometric sans if unavailable, like Space Grotesk/Inter as fallback ONLY if Cabinet fails, but prioritize a sharp sans), IBM Plex Mono.
Build the 4-widget dashboard as the hero view. Ensure the 'Recovered this week' counter is massive and emotionally impactful.
Implement the tone ladder badges (1, 2, 3) with distinct colors.
Ensure the Demo Mode control strip is clearly visible and functional.
